General.Name: Winfull Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Winfull Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property investment, development, and trading businesses in Hong Kong, the United Kingdom, and Japan. It also provides art installation, interior design, and architecture works services; security investment and trading; and money lending services. The company was formerly known as Richfield Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to Winfull Group Holdings Limited in March 2015. Winfull Group Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Winfull Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Virtue Partner Group Limited.

1.Name: Mr. Wing Yin  Lee CPA, FCCA
1.Title: CEO, Compliance Officer, Company Secretary & Executive Director
